title: Light Novel 'Sekai Saikyou no Majo, Hajimemashita' Get TV Anime in Fall 2026
content: Production company Pony Canyon opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Mochimaru Sakaki 's Sekai Saikyou no Majo, Hajimemashita: Watashi dake "Kouryaku Site" wo Mireru Sekai de Jiyuu ni Ikimasu ( The World's Strongest Witch: I'm Starting My Free Life in a World Where Only I Can See the Online…
author: MyAnimeList

title: Young Ladies Don't Play Fighting Games Anime's 2nd Teaser Reveals More Cast, Opening Song, July 7 Debut
content: The official website for the television anime of Eri Ejima 's Young Ladies Don't Play Fighting Games ( Tai Ari Deshita: Ojō-sama wa Kakutō Game Nante Shinai ) manga posted the second teaser promotional video for the anime on Friday.
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia Is All Set For Its True Finale With First Look At Beloved Characters After 8 Years
content: In December 2025, fans bid a bittersweet farewell to My Hero Academia ‘s anime nine years after its debut. It took the anime series a little more than a year after the manga finale to wrap up the story with an epilogue of the Final War.
author: ComicBook

title: Chiikawa Anime Casts Momo Harumi as Furuhonya
content: The anime of Nagano 's Chiikawa manga began streaming its second promotional video on Friday. The video announces that Momo Harumi has joined the cast as Furuhonya (Secondhand Book Seller), who has a crab hair ornament.
author: ANN

title: CoMix Wave Films' 'Shiranui' Anime Short Unveils Cast in Trailer
content: The official website for CoMix Wave Films ' new anime short film " Shiranui " unveiled the full trailer for the short on Friday. The trailer announces more cast members for the short.
author: ANN

title: After Kagurabachi Anime, Shonen Jump’s New Fantasy Will Be The Biggest Hit
content: After waiting for almost three years, Kagurabachi fans finally got the anime announcement, and the series will premiere next year. The acclaimed Weekly Shonen Jump manga written and illustrated by Takeru Hokazono began serialization in September 2023 and immediately captured readers’ attention, becoming viral right…
author: ComicBook

title: Sword Art Online Franchise Gets New Original Film
content: The Sword Art Online franchise 's "Yuna First Live" concert ended its streaming on Wednesday with a teaser for a "brand-new original film." The teaser promises more information in July. (Wednesday's stream recreated the character Yuna's concert from the 2017 Sword Art Online the Movie: Ordinal Scale film.
author: ANN

title: WEBTOON's ShootAround Heads to Big Screen as YA Live-Action Film
content: The project's writer will be Aiyana K. White, ( Severance , The Night Agent ). Susanna Nousiainen's (Suspu) original WEBTOON has accumulated more than 28 million views on WEBTOON .
author: ANN

title: 5 Anime Where the Protagonist Is Genuinely the Most Interesting Character
content: There are many incredible anime protagonists, but few of them stand out as the single most interesting character of their series. Even well-written leads, like Jujutsu Kaisen ‘s Itadori and My Hero Academia ‘s Midoriya, are often overshadowed by more intriguing supporting players .
author: ComicBook

title: Chainsaw Man Set Crunchyroll Record For Highest Viewed Anime at the Time With Season 1, Says MAPPA CEO
content: MAPPA CEO Manabu Otsuka said recently that Chainsaw Man Season 1 set a record for the highest view count on Crunchyroll at the time. (The series debuted in October 2022.) He revealed this in a discussion with writer Tokuriki; you can find his comments on the subject in full below: ALSO READ: Jujutsu Kaisen: Modulo…
author: Anime Corner
